message:
fix(recorder): preserve cancelled health backend truth (ft-xxp05)

Regression test added in recorder_storage.rs. Verification attempted with rch exec and scripts/cargo-local.sh, but the first failures are unrelated existing compile errors in crates/frankenterm-core/src/runtime.rs, crates/frankenterm-core/src/vendored/mux_client.rs, and crates/frankenterm-core/src/web_framework.rs.
